name: Tadalafil Off-Label Effects Review
summary: A literature-review domain for off-label tadalafil/Cialis effects and risks across cognition, mild cognitive impairment, mood, well-being, cardiovascular health, exercise physiology, and longevity-relevant outcomes, with a target-interest population of mostly healthy men age 30 to 50.

source_access_policy.notes: Clinical and safety findings should use full text when available; abstract-only findings must mark the access limitation and source locator.

applicability_facets.label: Population Band
applicability_facets.description: Population directness relative to the primary user-interest group and adjacent clinical populations.

applicability_facets.label: Study Design Class
applicability_facets.description: Evidence design used to judge causal strength and directness.

avoid: presenting off-label tadalafil use as medical advice or as a recommendation to start, stop, or change treatment
treating ED, BPH, pulmonary-hypertension, or older-disease-population evidence as directly applicable to healthy men age 30 to 50 without an explicit directness caveat
claiming cognitive, mood, cardiovascular, or longevity benefit from mechanistic nitric-oxide/cGMP reasoning alone
generalizing sildenafil or other PDE5-inhibitor evidence to tadalafil without pharmacokinetic, dose, or population justification
separating possible benefits from the contraindication and interaction profile
using surrogate biomarkers as longevity or healthspan outcomes unless the source directly validates that interpretation

sources.label: FDA questions and answers for Cialis

baseline_notes: Contraindications, hypotension interactions, cardiovascular-status warnings, visual and hearing adverse-event warnings, renal/hepatic dosing limits, and common adverse reactions should be checked against current labeling during safety appraisal.
A benefit-oriented off-label claim cannot pass editorial review unless safety and interaction boundaries are visible near the claim.

synthesis_matrix.title: Tadalafil Evidence Synthesis Matrix
synthesis_matrix.description: Compare tadalafil studies by population, dose/exposure, comparator, endpoint domain, effect direction, quantitative result, safety signal, and directness to the target population.
synthesis_matrix.empty_state: No tadalafil study artifacts have been published for this review yet.
